allow: Bash(npx next lint 2>&1 | grep -B1 "Error:" | grep "^\\./src" | sort -u)

Bash(npx eslint src/db/seed.ts --fix-dry-run --format json > eslint-output.json 2>&1; node -e "const json = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('eslint-output.json','utf8'\)\); const msgs = json[0].messages.filter\(m => m.ruleId && \(m.ruleId.includes\('numeric'\) || m.ruleId.includes\('zero'\)\)\); console.log\('Messages:', msgs.length\); msgs.forEach\(m => console.log\(m.line, m.column, m.ruleId, m.message\)\);")

Bash(npx eslint src/db/seed.ts --rule '{"unicorn/numeric-separators-style": ["error", {"onlyIfContainsSeparator": true, "number": {"minimumDigits": 0, "groupLength": 3}}]}' --format json > eslint-output.json 2>&1; node -e "const json = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('eslint-output.json','utf8'\)\); const msgs = json[0].messages.filter\(m => m.ruleId && \(m.ruleId.includes\('numeric'\) || m.ruleId.includes\('zero'\)\)\); console.log\('Messages:', msgs.length\); msgs.forEach\(m => console.log\(m.line, m.column, m.ruleId, m.message\)\);")

Bash(npx eslint src/db/seed.ts --rule '{"unicorn/numeric-separators-style": ["error", {"onlyIfContainsSeparator": false, "number": {"minimumDigits": 0, "groupLength": 3}}]}' --format json > eslint-output.json 2>&1; node -e "const json = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('eslint-output.json','utf8'\)\); const msgs = json[0].messages.filter\(m => m.ruleId && m.ruleId.includes\('numeric'\)\); console.log\('Messages:', msgs.length\); msgs.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(m => console.log\(m.line, m.column, m.ruleId, m.message\)\);")

Bash(npx eslint src/db/seed.ts --rule '{"unicorn/numeric-separators-style": ["error", {"onlyIfContainsSeparator": true, "number": {"minimumDigits": 0, "groupLength": 3}}]}' --format json > eslint-output.json 2>&1; node -e "const json = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('eslint-output.json','utf8'\)\); const msgs = json[0].messages.filter\(m => m.ruleId && m.ruleId.includes\('numeric'\)\); console.log\('Numeric separator messages:', msgs.length\); msgs.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(m => console.log\(m.line, m.column, m.message\)\);")

Bash(npx eslint "src/app/[locale]/\(main\)/_components/services-client-component.tsx" --rule '{"unicorn/no-zero-fractions": "error"}' --format json > eslint-output.json 2>&1; node -e "const json = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('eslint-output.json','utf8'\)\); const msgs = json[0].messages.filter\(m => m.ruleId === 'unicorn/no-zero-fractions'\); msgs.forEach\(m => console.log\('Line', m.line, 'Col', m.column, m.message\)\);")
